title: Supply Chain Manager - COSCO India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - COSCO India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the COSCO India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About COSCO India:
COSCO India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with COSCO India!
